framework.name: AutoGen
framework.description: Conversation-driven multi-agent framework built on the Actor model with async pub/sub messaging. Three-layer architecture with strict one-way dependencies: autogen-core → autogen-agentchat → autogen-ext.

modules.name: Agent Runtime
modules.description: Manages agent lifecycle and message routing. SingleThreadedAgentRuntime for local dev; gRPC-based distributed runtime for production.

modules.name: RoutedAgent
modules.description: Base agent primitive built on Actor model — independent unit communicating via async message passing. Subclassed for specific roles.

modules.name: Pub/Sub Bus
modules.description: Async messaging backbone. Agents publish messages to topics, subscribe handlers to topics — complete loose coupling between agents.

modules.name: GroupChat
modules.description: Turn-based multi-agent conversation container with shared context. Supports RoundRobin, auto speaker selection, or custom selectors.

modules.name: GroupChatManager
modules.description: Orchestrator: speaker selection, termination rules, message routing. Plugs custom selector functions for advanced coordination.

modules.name: ModelContext
modules.description: ChatCompletionContext managing conversation history. Buffered variant keeps sliding window of recent messages for context window management.

modules.name: Topic Registry
modules.description: Resolves agent subscriptions to pub/sub topics. Maps topic strings to agent handler registrations.

metadata.description: Runtime instantiates agents, registers their topic subscriptions
Agent publishes typed message to a topic
Bus delivers message to all agents subscribed to the topic
GroupChat delegates speaker selection and termination to manager
Manager broadcasts selected speaker's message to all group members
Registry tells bus which agents subscribe to which topics
Agent reads/writes conversation history via ModelContext
Agent registers message handler for specific topic

phases.name: Agent Setup & Registration
phases.description: Runtime spawns agents; each registers topic subscriptions and binds model context

steps.description: Runtime instantiates all RoutedAgents for the session
Each agent registers message handlers with Topic Registry
Each agent binds to a ModelContext for conversation history management

phases.name: Pub/Sub Conversation Loop
phases.description: Agents communicate via async pub/sub; GroupChatManager orchestrates turn-taking

steps.description: Agent receives typed message via pub/sub delivery
Agent loads conversation history from ModelContext
Agent calls LLM with instructions + context, generates response or tool call
Agent publishes response message to appropriate topic
Manager selects next speaker based on strategy and termination rules

phases.name: Termination
phases.description: GroupChatManager evaluates termination conditions and ends conversation

steps.description: Manager checks termination conditions against conversation state
Runtime stops all agents, collects final results
